overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk fast-food restaurant kitchen from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves through a neon-lit interior with dominant red and cyan lighting, passing food display counters and active cooking stations where NPC chefs are working at grills and woks.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk diner entrance with neon signage and service counter

events.description: camera turns slightly right to follow the curve of the service counter

agents.ego_description: walking into the diner through the entrance corridor, observing the neon-lit counter area and digital menu screens

notable_agents.action: customer with blue hair leaning against the left counter

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement poster with face and text 'WHEN YOU ARE SKY HIGH'
long curved metal counter with food preparation surfaces
suspended screens displaying menu items with cyan and pink graphics
commercial stainless steel microwave on the counter
glass-door refrigerator unit with orange cups visible inside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view entering a cyberpunk diner. Neon signs glow with red and cyan light, particularly the large 'SKY HIGH' advertisement at the far end. The camera moves along the right-side service counter which features a microwave and glass refrigerator. A customer with distinctive blue hair stands at the left counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: food display counter with prepared meals and pizza

events.description: camera focuses on displayed food items including pizza, sandwiches, and stacked cups on the counter
approaching the transition from front counter to active cooking area with visible kitchen equipment

agents.ego_description: moving along the display counter examining the food items while approaching the cooking line where a chef is visible

notable_agents.action: chef in red shirt working at the cooking station in the background

entered.detail: large pepperoni pizza on metal tray placed on the counter
plates with sandwiches and french fries arranged for display
tall stacks of orange and white striped disposable cups
large stainless steel exhaust hood over the cooking line

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the front counter into the food display area where a large pizza and sandwich plates are prominently displayed. The service counter now runs along the left side. Stacks of orange cups sit on the right. In the background, a chef in a red shirt works under a large ventilation hood, signaling the transition to the active kitchen area.

scene_state.functional_zone: active commercial kitchen with multiple cooking stations and chefs

events.description: entering the active cooking line with visible woks, grills, and multiple chefs working
steam and cooking smoke visible rising from the active grills and woks

agents.ego_description: walking through the kitchen workspace observing the cooking activity, passing chefs working at woks and grill stations

notable_agents.action: chef in red shirt actively stirring and cooking with a large wok
chef in white shirt and red apron working at the grill station near the pass-through window

entered.detail: large wok on high-burner stove with visible flames and steam
flat-top grill with food being prepared and metal utensils
large metal pan filled with cooking food on the counter
service window connecting kitchen to dining area with visible customers

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the active kitchen where two chefs are working at their stations. The camera moves past a large pan of food on the counter and a wok station where a chef in red is cooking. Steam rises from the grills. A pass-through window on the right shows the dining area beyond. The environment is busy with cooking activity and industrial kitchen equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear kitchen prep area with red ambient lighting and grilling station

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to deep red hue in the back corner of the kitchen
approaching the rear wall with grill station featuring skewered meats and prep surfaces

agents.ego_description: moving through the back kitchen corner examining the grill station with skewers and prep equipment

notable_agents.action: chef in white shirt working at the prep station near cardboard boxes

entered.detail: grill surface with multiple skewers of meat and vegetables cooking
metal preparation table with bowls and cooking utensils
stacked cardboard delivery boxes on the floor near the prep area
industrial metal shelving unit with kitchen supplies

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the back corner of the kitchen where red lighting dominates the atmosphere. A grill station with skewers of meat is prominently visible in the center. To the left, a chef works at a prep table near stacked cardboard boxes. The camera moves slowly past cooking equipment and metal shelving, exploring the rear prep area of the cyberpunk diner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the neon-lit entrance of a cyberpunk diner into the bustling activity of its food preparation area. It begins by entering the establishment under the glow of red and cyan lights, gliding past a service counter equipped with a microwave and refrigerator while a blue-haired customer stands nearby. As the camera moves further inward, the perspective shifts past the front counter toward a food display area featuring large pizzas and sandwich plates. The scene then expands as the service counter moves to the left and stacks of orange cups appear on the right, before finally opening up to reveal a chef in a red shirt working beneath a large ventilation hood in the active kitchen.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling cyberpunk kitchen that shifts from an active cooking line into a dimly lit rear prep area. It begins by gliding past a large pan of food and a wok station where a chef in red works amidst rising steam, with a pass-through window offering a glimpse of the dining area to the right. As the camera pushes deeper into the industrial space, the atmosphere transitions into a moodier environment dominated by deep red lighting. The scene then opens into the back corner of the kitchen, moving past a grill station filled with skewers of meat and a chef working at a prep table near stacked cardboard boxes. Finally, the camera drifts slowly past metal shelving and heavy cooking equipment to explore the furthest reaches of the diner's rear workspace.
